title: Birds
description: Learn birds in Filipino Sign Language

pages.title: Welcome to Birds
pages.content: In this lesson, you'll learn how to sign birds in Filipino Sign Language (FSL). You'll learn 2 important signs with step-by-step instructions and practice questions.

pages.title: How to Sign 'Bird'
pages.content:
Learn how to sign 'Bird'. A warm-blooded egg-laying vertebrate distinguished by feathers, wings, and a beak. 

How to sign:
1. Use the dominant hand, forming a "beak" with the index finger and thumb. 2. Tap the finger and thumb together near the mouth once or twice.

pages.title: How to Sign 'Chicken'
pages.content:
Learn how to sign 'Chicken'. A common domestic fowl kept for its eggs or meat. 

How to sign:
1. Use the dominant hand in the 'G' or 'V' handshape. 2. Start the hand near the mouth. 3. Peck the hand down toward the non-dominant flat palm.

pages.title: Practice: Bird
pages.content: Test your understanding with this question.

question.explanation:
This sign means 'Bird'. A warm-blooded egg-laying vertebrate distinguished by feathers, wings, and a beak.

How to sign: 1. Use the dominant hand, forming a "beak" with the index finger and thumb. 2. Tap the finger and thumb together near the mouth once or twice.
